84:
WITH all_admins AS (
    SELECT AdmFName1 AS fname, District FROM schools
    UNION ALL SELECT AdmFName2, District FROM schools
    UNION ALL SELECT AdmFName3, District FROM schools
),
name_counts AS (
    SELECT fname, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM all_admins
    WHERE fname IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY fname
),
top_names AS (
    SELECT fname
    FROM name_counts
    ORDER BY cnt DESC
    LIMIT 2
)
SELECT a.fname, a.District
FROM all_admins a
JOIN name_counts nc ON a.fname = nc.fname
WHERE a.fname IN (SELECT fname FROM top_names)
ORDER BY nc.cnt DESC, a.District;	----- bird -----	california_schools

94:
SELECT disp.account_id,
       ( (SELECT MAX(district.A11) FROM client JOIN district ON client.district_id = district.district_id)
         - (SELECT MIN(district.A11) FROM client JOIN district ON client.district_id = district.district_id
             WHERE client.gender='F'
               AND client.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender='F')) ) AS gap
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN district ON client.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE client.gender='F'
  AND client.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender='F')
  AND district.A11 = (SELECT MIN(district.A11) FROM client JOIN district ON client.district_id = district.district_id
                      WHERE client.gender='F'
                        AND client.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender='F'));	----- bird -----	financial

SELECT
  (SUM(CASE WHEN yr = '1997' THEN amount END) -
   SUM(CASE WHEN yr = '1996' THEN amount END)) * 100.0 /
  NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN yr = '1996' THEN amount END), 0) AS growth_rate
FROM (
  SELECT l.amount,
         strftime('%Y', l.date) AS yr
  FROM loan l

);	----- bird -----	financial

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN combo = (
    SELECT combo FROM (
        SELECT combo, COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM (
            SELECT CASE WHEN a1.element <= a2.element THEN a1.element || ',' || a2.element
                        ELSE a2.element || ',' || a1.element END AS combo
            FROM bond b
            JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
            JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
            JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
        ) t
        GROUP BY combo
        ORDER BY cnt DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM (
    SELECT CASE WHEN a1.element <= a2.element THEN a1.element || ',' || a2.element
                ELSE a2.element || ',' || a1.element END AS combo
    FROM bond b
    JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
    JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
    JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
) t;	----- bird -----	toxicology

JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = '#'
  AND a.element = 'c'
  AND m.label = '-'
LIMIT 2;	----- bird -----	toxicology
273:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT c.molecule_id) = 0 THEN 0
    ELSE (CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT cm.molecule_id) AS REAL) / CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT c.molecule_id) AS REAL)) * 100
  END AS percentage
FROM
  (SELECT molecule_id FROM molecule WHERE label = '+') AS c
LEFT JOIN
  (SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id
   FROM atom a
   WHERE a.element = 'cl') AS cm
ON c.molecule_id = cm.molecule_id;	----- bird -----	toxicology

WITH RECURSIVE
  split(id, tag, rest) AS (
    SELECT p.Id,
           substr(p.Tags, 2, instr(p.Tags, '>')-2) AS tag,
           substr(p.Tags, instr(p.Tags, '>')+1) AS rest
    FROM posts p
    JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
    WHERE u.DisplayName = 'John Salvatier'
      AND p.Tags IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT id,
           substr(rest, 2, instr(rest, '>')-2),
           substr(rest, instr(rest, '>')+1)
    FROM split
    WHERE rest <> '' AND rest LIKE '<%'
  )
SELECT DISTINCT tag
FROM split;	----- bird -----	codebase_community

943:
WITH race AS (
    SELECT raceId
    FROM races
    WHERE year = 2008
      AND name LIKE '%Australian Grand Prix%'
),
max_lap AS (
    SELECT MAX(lap) AS max_lap
    FROM lapTimes
    WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM race)
),
driver_lap_counts AS (
    SELECT driverId, COUNT(DISTINCT lap) AS laps_completed
    FROM lapTimes
    WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM race)
      AND time IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY driverId
),
total_drivers AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT driverId) AS total
    FROM lapTimes
    WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM race)
),
completed_drivers AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS completed
    FROM driver_lap_counts
    WHERE laps_completed = (SELECT max_lap FROM max_lap)
)
SELECT CAST(completed AS REAL) / total AS completion_rate
FROM completed_drivers, total_drivers;	----- bird -----	formula_1
944:
SELECT
  CAST(
    ( (last_ms - champ_ms) / last_ms * 100.0 )
  AS REAL) AS percentage_faster
FROM (
  SELECT
    (CAST(substr(last.time,1,2) AS INTEGER)*3600 +
     CAST(substr(last.time,4,2) AS INTEGER)*60 +
     CAST(substr(last.time,7,2) AS INTEGER))*1000 +
     CAST(substr(last.time,10,3) AS INTEGER) AS last_ms,
    (CAST(substr(champ.time,1,2) AS INTEGER)*3600 +
     CAST(substr(champ.time,4,2) AS INTEGER)*60 +
     CAST(substr(champ.time,7,2) AS INTEGER))*1000 +
     CAST(substr(champ.time,10,3) AS INTEGER) AS champ_ms
  FROM
    (SELECT r.raceId
     FROM races r
     WHERE r.year = 2008
       AND r.name LIKE '%Australian%') AS race
  JOIN results champ
    ON champ.raceId = race.raceId
   AND champ.position = 1
   AND champ.time IS NOT NULL
  JOIN results last
    ON last.raceId = race.raceId
   AND last.position = (
        SELECT MAX(position)
        FROM results
        WHERE raceId = race.raceId
      )
   AND last.time IS NOT NULL
) AS t;	----- bird -----	formula_1

1094:
SELECT
    CAST((a.overall_rating - p.overall_rating) AS REAL) / p.overall_rating * 100 AS percent_difference
FROM
    (SELECT pa.overall_rating
     FROM Player_Attributes pa
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk') a
CROSS JOIN
    (SELECT pa.overall_rating

SELECT c.name, AVG(p.weight) AS avg_weight
FROM (
    SELECT country_id, home_player_1 AS player_api_id FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_2 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_3 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_4 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_5 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_6 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_7 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_8 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_9 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_10 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, home_player_11 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_1 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_2 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_3 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_4 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_5 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_6 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_7 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_8 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_9 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_10 FROM Match
    UNION ALL SELECT country_id, away_player_11 FROM Match
) AS ap
JOIN Player p ON p.player_api_id = ap.player_api_id
JOIN Country c ON c.id = ap.country_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
ORDER BY avg_weight DESC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	european_football_2

SELECT
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM (
     SELECT Segment, AVG(total_consumption) AS avg_consumption
     FROM (
       WITH cte AS (
         SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, c.Currency, ym.Date, ym.Consumption
         FROM yearmonth ym
         JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
         WHERE c.Currency='CZK' AND ym.Date LIKE '2013%'
       ),
       totals AS (
         SELECT CustomerID, Segment, SUM(Consumption) AS total_consumption
         FROM cte
         GROUP BY CustomerID, Segment
       ),
       mincons AS (
         SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_total
         FROM totals
         GROUP BY Segment
       ),
       lowest AS (
         SELECT t.Segment, t.total_consumption
         FROM totals t
         JOIN mincons m ON t.Segment=m.Segment AND t.total_consumption=m.min_total

1482:
WITH seg_consumption AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           substr(y.Date, 1, 4) AS yr,
           SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
),
seg_years AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           MAX(CASE WHEN yr = '2012' THEN total END) AS cons2012,
           MAX(CASE WHEN yr = '2013' THEN total END) AS cons2013
    FROM seg_consumption
    GROUP BY Segment
),
seg_percent AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           ((cons2013 - cons2012) / cons2013) * 100.0 AS pct
    FROM seg_years
    WHERE cons2013 <> 0
)
SELECT Segment, pct, 'biggest' AS type
FROM seg_percent
WHERE pct = (SELECT MAX(pct) FROM seg_percent)
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, pct, 'lowest' AS type
FROM seg_percent
WHERE pct = (SELECT MIN(pct) FROM seg_percent);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
